---
title: "Data Extraction from Government Budget PDF"
author: "Nandini Agarwal"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
```

## Objective

This project extracts structured financial data from a government budget PDF (`Gr09.pdf`).

* Page 3 → Division of Grant
* Page 6 → Other Taxes and Duties

---

## Load Libraries

```{r}
# ===============================
# LOAD LIBRARIES
# ===============================
library(tabulapdf)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(pdftools) 
```

---

## Load File

```{r}
file_path <- "Gr09.pdf"
```

---

# ===============================

# PAGE 3: DIVISION OF GRANT

# ===============================

```{r}
# -------------------------------
# 1. Extract: Division of Grant (Page 3)
# -------------------------------
division_tables <- extract_tables(
  file_path,
  pages = 3,
  method = "stream",     # better for text-based tables
  output = "tibble"
)

# Combine multiple tables (if extracted)
division_raw <- bind_rows(division_tables)

# Rename numeric columns for clarity
colnames(division_raw)[3:6] <- c("Actuals", "BE", "RE", "BE_next")


# -------------------------------
# Function to clean broken Hindi text
# -------------------------------
fix_hindi <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    str_replace_all("कुलि योग", "कुल योग") %>%          # fix total label
    str_replace_all("योग\\s*:\\s*राजस्वि?", "योग : राजस्व") %>%
    str_replace_all("योग\\s*:\\s*पजंी", "योग : पूंजी") %>%
    str_replace_all("मतदये|मतदये", "मतदेय") %>%       # voted
    str_replace_all("भािरत|भािरत", "भारित") %>%       # charged
    str_squish()                                       # remove extra spaces
}

# Mapping: Major head → Hindi description
hindi_head_map <- c(
  "2045" = "वस्तुओं तथा सेवाओं पर अन्य कर तथा शुल्क",
  "2049" = "ब्याज अदायगियां",
  "2059" = "लोक निर्माण कार्य",
  "2071" = "पेंशन तथा अन्य सेवा निवृत्ति हित लाभ",
  "2801" = "बिजली",
  "4801" = "बिजली परियोजनाओं पर पूंजीगत व्यय",
  "6003" = "राज्य सरकार का आन्तरिक ऋण",
  "6801" = "बिजली परियोजनाओं के लिए ऋण"
)


# -------------------------------
# 2. Clean data (Page 3)
# -------------------------------
clean_division <- function(df) {
  
  # Rename first two columns
  colnames(df)[1:2] <- c("Description", "Type")
  
  df %>%
    
    # Remove completely empty rows
    filter(!(is.na(Description) & is.na(Type))) %>%
    
    # Clean Hindi text
    mutate(
      Description = fix_hindi(Description),
      Type = fix_hindi(Type)
    ) %>%
    
    # Extract major head (first 4 digits)
    mutate(
      major_head = str_extract(Description, "^[0-9]{4}")
    ) %>%
    
    # Fill missing major head downward
    fill(major_head, .direction = "down") %>%
    
    # Extract numeric values from columns
    mutate(
      Actuals_22_23 = as.numeric(str_extract(Actuals, "[0-9.]+")),
      BE_23_24      = as.numeric(str_extract(BE, "[0-9.]+")),
      RE_23_24      = as.numeric(str_extract(RE, "[0-9.]+")),
      BE_24_25      = as.numeric(str_extract(BE_next, "[0-9.]+"))
    ) %>%
    
    # Replace NA with 0
    mutate(
      across(
        c(Actuals_22_23, BE_23_24, RE_23_24, BE_24_25),
        ~replace_na(., 0)
      )
    ) %>%
    
    # Identify category (Voted / Charged / Total)
    mutate(
      Category = case_when(
        grepl("मतदेय", paste(Description, Type)) ~ "Voted",
        grepl("भारित", paste(Description, Type)) ~ "Charged",
        grepl("योग", Description) ~ "Total",
        TRUE ~ "Other"
      )
    ) %>%
    
    # Keep only relevant columns
    select(
      major_head,
      Description,
      Category,
      Actuals_22_23,
      BE_23_24,
      RE_23_24,
      BE_24_25
    )
}

# Apply cleaning function
division_clean <- clean_division(division_raw)


# -------------------------------
# 3. Structure data (Page 3)
# -------------------------------
division_ready <- division_clean %>%
  
  # Fill missing descriptions
  fill(Description, .direction = "down") %>%
  
  # Remove useless rows (all zero + Other)
  filter(
    !(Category == "Other" & 
        Actuals_22_23 == 0 & 
        BE_23_24 == 0 &
        RE_23_24 == 0 & 
        BE_24_25 == 0)
  ) %>%
  
  # Identify hierarchy level
  mutate(
    level = case_when(
      grepl("कुल योग", Description) ~ "Grand Total",
      grepl("योग : राजस्व", Description) ~ "Revenue Total",
      grepl("योग : पूंजी", Description) ~ "Capital Total",
      grepl("^[0-9]{4}", Description) ~ "Detail",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  ) %>%
  
  # Assign Hindi labels
  mutate(
    head_name_hi = case_when(
      level == "Revenue Total" ~ "राजस्व खाता कुल",
      level == "Capital Total" ~ "पूंजी खाता कुल",
      level == "Grand Total" ~ "कुल योग",
      TRUE ~ hindi_head_map[major_head]
    ),
    
    # Final Hindi column
    head_name = head_name_hi  
  )


# -------------------------------
# 4. English mapping
# -------------------------------
major_head_map <- c(
  "2045" = "Other Taxes & Duties on Commodities and Services",
  "2049" = "Interest Payments",
  "2059" = "Public Works",
  "2071" = "Pensions and Other Retirement Benefits",
  "2801" = "Power",
  "4801" = "Capital Outlay on Power Projects",
  "6003" = "Internal Debt of State Government",
  "6801" = "Loans for Power Projects",
  "REV_TOTAL" = "Revenue Account Total",
  "CAP_TOTAL" = "Capital Account Total",
  "GRAND_TOTAL" = "Grand Total"
)


# -------------------------------
# 5. Convert to long format
# -------------------------------
division_long <- division_ready %>%
  
  # Convert wide → long
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Actuals_22_23, BE_23_24, RE_23_24, BE_24_25),
    names_to = "year_type",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  
  # Add readable year labels
  mutate(
    year = case_when(
      year_type == "Actuals_22_23" ~ "2022-23",
      year_type == "BE_23_24"      ~ "2023-24 (BE)",
      year_type == "RE_23_24"      ~ "2023-24 (RE)",
      year_type == "BE_24_25"      ~ "2024-25"
    ),
    
    # English labels (override totals correctly)
    head_name_en = case_when(
      level == "Revenue Total" ~ "Revenue Account Total",
      level == "Capital Total" ~ "Capital Account Total",
      level == "Grand Total" ~ "Grand Total",
      TRUE ~ major_head_map[major_head]
    )
  )%>%
  
  # Keep final columns
  select(
    major_head,
    head_name,
    head_name_en,
    Category,
    level,
    year,
    value
  )


# -------------------------------
# 6. Convert to wide format
# -------------------------------
division_wide <- division_long %>%
  
  # Convert long → wide
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = year,
    values_from = value
  ) %>%
  
  # Sort logically
  arrange(
    factor(level, levels = c("Detail", "Revenue Total", "Capital Total", "Grand Total")),
    major_head,
    Category
  ) %>%
  
  # Rename Category → Type
  mutate(Type = Category) %>%
  
  # Final column order
  select(
    major_head,
    head_name,
    head_name_en,
    Type,
    `2022-23`,
    `2023-24 (BE)`,
    `2023-24 (RE)`,
    `2024-25`
  )


# -------------------------------
# Output files
# -------------------------------
write_excel_csv(division_wide, "division_of_grant_wide.csv")
write_excel_csv(division_long, "division_of_grant_long.csv")

# Preview output
head(division_wide)
head(division_long)
```

---

# ===============================

# PAGE 6: OTHER TAXES AND DUTIES

# ===============================

```{r}
# Extract full text
pdf_text_data <- pdf_text(file_path)

# Split page 6 into lines
lines <- pdf_text_data[6] %>%
  str_split("\n") %>%
  unlist() %>%
  str_trim()

# Remove empty lines
lines <- lines[lines != ""]


# -------------------------------
# 1: Extract numeric data
# -------------------------------
other_taxes_df <- tibble(raw = lines) %>%
  mutate(
    row_id = row_number(),
    
    # Replace missing "--" with 0
    raw_clean = str_replace_all(raw, "--", "0"),
    
    # Extract all numbers
    nums = str_extract_all(raw_clean, "[0-9.]+"),
    
    # Keep rows with enough numeric values
    valid = lengths(nums) >= 4
  ) %>%
  filter(valid) %>%
  
  # Assign numeric columns
  mutate(
    Actuals_22_23 = as.numeric(sapply(nums, `[`, 1)),
    BE_23_24      = as.numeric(sapply(nums, `[`, 2)),
    RE_23_24      = as.numeric(sapply(nums, `[`, 3)),
    BE_24_25      = as.numeric(sapply(nums, function(x) tail(x, 1))),
    
    # Extract item code
    item_code = str_extract(raw_clean, "[0-9]{2}(?=\\s*-)"),
    
    # Extract description text
    description = raw_clean %>%
      str_remove("^[0-9.]+\\s+[0-9.]+\\s+[0-9.]+\\s+") %>%
      str_remove("\\s+[0-9.]+$") %>%
      str_replace("^[0-9]{2}\\s*-\\s*", "") %>%
      str_squish(),
    
    # Identify totals
    is_total = str_detect(raw_clean, "योग")
  )


# -------------------------------
# 2: Extract hierarchy
# -------------------------------
hierarchy_full <- tibble(raw = lines) %>%
  mutate(
    row_id = row_number(),
    
    # Identify year rows
    is_year_row = str_detect(raw, "^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{4}"),
    
    # Extract hierarchy levels
    major_head = ifelse(!is_year_row, str_extract(raw, "^[0-9]{4}(?=\\s*-)"), NA),
    sub_head   = ifelse(!is_year_row, str_extract(raw, "^[0-9]{3}(?=\\s*-)"), NA),
    sub_sub    = ifelse(!is_year_row, str_extract(raw, "^[0-9]{2}(?=\\s*-)"), NA)
  ) %>%
  
  # Fill hierarchy downward
  fill(major_head, sub_head, sub_sub, .direction = "down")


# -------------------------------
# 3: Combine and clean
# -------------------------------
other_taxes_final <- other_taxes_df %>%
  left_join(hierarchy_full, by = "row_id") %>%
  
  # Remove unwanted rows
  filter(
    !str_detect(raw_clean, "202[0-9]"),
    (Actuals_22_23 < 1900 & !is_total) | is_total
  ) %>%
  
  mutate(
    # Define row type
    row_type = case_when(
      is_total ~ "Total",
      !is.na(item_code) ~ "Item"
    ),
    
    # Hindi description
    description_hi = case_when(
      row_type == "Total" ~ "योग",
      TRUE ~ str_squish(description)
    )
  ) %>%
  
  # Keep valid rows only
  filter(row_type %in% c("Item", "Total"))


# Hindi mapping (item codes)
hindi_code_map <- c(
  "01"="वेतन","02"="मजदूरी","03"="महंगाई भत्ता","04"="यात्रा व्यय",
  "05"="स्थानांतरण यात्रा व्यय","06"="अन्य भत्ते","07"="मानदेय",
  "08"="कार्यालय व्यय","09"="विद्युत शुल्क","10"="जल शुल्क",
  "11"="लेखन सामग्री","12"="फर्नीचर एवं उपकरण","13"="टेलीफोन व्यय",
  "15"="वाहन रखरखाव","16"="व्यावसायिक सेवाएं","17"="किराया एवं कर",
  "18"="प्रकाशन","26"="मशीनरी एवं उपकरण","44"="प्रशिक्षण व्यय",
  "45"="विकास यात्रा","46"="कंप्यूटर खरीद","47"="कंप्यूटर रखरखाव",
  "49"="चिकित्सा व्यय","51"="विदेश व्यय",
  "55"="मकान किराया भत्ता","58"="आउटसोर्स सेवाएं"
)

# Apply Hindi mapping
other_taxes_final <- other_taxes_final %>%
  mutate(
    description_hi = case_when(
      row_type == "Total" ~ "योग",
      TRUE ~ recode(item_code, !!!hindi_code_map)
    )
  )


# -------------------------------
# 4: English labels
# -------------------------------
code_map <- c(
  "01"="Salary","02"="Wages","03"="Dearness Allowance","04"="Travel Expenses",
  "05"="Transfer Travel Expenses","06"="Other Allowances","07"="Honorarium",
  "08"="Office Expenses","09"="Electricity Charges","10"="Water Charges",
  "11"="Stationery and Printing","12"="Office Furniture and Equipment",
  "13"="Telephone Expenses","15"="Vehicle Maintenance and Fuel",
  "16"="Professional Services","17"="Rent, Rates and Taxes",
  "18"="Publications","26"="Machinery and Equipment",
  "44"="Training Travel Expenses","45"="Development Travel Expenses",
  "46"="Computer Hardware/Software Purchase","47"="Computer Maintenance",
  "49"="Medical Expenses","51"="Foreign Expenses",
  "55"="House Rent Allowance","58"="Outsourced Services"
)

# Apply English mapping
other_taxes_final <- other_taxes_final %>%
  mutate(
    description_en = case_when(
      row_type == "Total" ~ "Total",
      TRUE ~ recode(item_code, !!!code_map)
    )
  )


# -------------------------------
# 5: Final formatting
# -------------------------------
other_taxes_final <- other_taxes_final %>%
  mutate(
    # Round numeric values
    across(c(Actuals_22_23, BE_23_24, RE_23_24, BE_24_25), ~round(., 2))
  ) %>%
  
  # Select final columns
  select(
    major_head, sub_head, sub_sub,
    row_type, item_code,
    description_hi, description_en,
    Actuals_22_23, BE_23_24, RE_23_24, BE_24_25
  )

# Save output
write_excel_csv(other_taxes_final, "other_taxes_final.csv")

# Preview output
head(other_taxes_final)
```
